implementation_summary: Added an opt-in knowledge-backed actor runtime trait through BaseActorRunner, with freshness policy models, graph traversal budget policy, knowledge snapshot evaluation, cache/graph/vector/obsidian/database source metadata, safe query fingerprinting, and post-run knowledge recording hooks.
tests_run: python -m pytest tests/unit/test_actor_runtime.py tests/unit/test_actor_families.py tests/unit/test_actor_freshness_policy.py tests/unit/test_actor_graph_memory.py tests/unit/test_actor_knowledge_memory.py -q
python -m compileall -q packages/core/actor_runtime tests/unit/test_actor_freshness_policy.py tests/unit/test_actor_graph_memory.py tests/unit/test_actor_knowledge_memory.py
git diff --check -- packages/core/actor_runtime tests/unit docs/agent-sync/runtime docs/agent-sync/IMPLEMENTATION_LEDGER.md
python -m ruff check packages/core/actor_runtime tests/unit/test_actor_freshness_policy.py tests/unit/test_actor_graph_memory.py tests/unit/test_actor_knowledge_memory.py
tests_passed: 10 actor API regression tests passed with pre-existing warnings
tests_failed: python -m pytest tests/unit -q failed during collection because DATABASE_URL, yt_dlp, and pytest_asyncio were unavailable in the current environment
python -m ruff check failed because ruff is not installed in the current environment
known_limitations: knowledge_store integration is opt-in and not yet wired to persistent database/graph/vector stores
serve_cached_and_refresh marks stale reuse but does not schedule a background refresh yet
actor API response metadata wiring is deferred to C1
